rows.label: qev056101_MSG0001
rows.name: [ST:playername ], I was looking for you![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0002
rows.name:
You who once rescued us and led
us to this land... I wish to
borrow your strength once more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0003
rows.name:
First, before I explain the situation—
allow me to verify just how much you know
about the anomaly among our people.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0004
rows.name:
Are you familiar with the new
species of divided entities
born from us— the β-types?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0010
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask for details about the β-types.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0020
rows.name: Affirm[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0021
rows.name: Say he means the red divided entities.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0005
rows.name:
I am speaking of the red divided
entities that began appearing
after we arrived in NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0006
rows.name:
Not only their appearance, but their
psychological structure also possesses
traits vastly different from ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0007
rows.name:
Hmm, I see you have already
made contact with them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0008
rows.name:
In that case, you must also be aware
that they possess a psychological
structure completely different from ours.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0009
rows.name:
They already possessed traits that
were somewhat Earthling-like, illogical,
and intensely curious, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0010
rows.name:
The recent β-types deny the inner
voice of the Ovah, advocating
that we should live freely—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0011
rows.name:
It escalated to the point where
they launched an insolent movement
called the anti-Ovah revolution.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0012
rows.name:
They clashed with my group, and at
the end of our debates, they marched
out to the Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0013
rows.name:
As you know, that forest is dangerous.
It is not a place where an Orphean can
survive without someone's protection.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0014
rows.name:
...So, I want you to track them
down and bring them back to
NLA, by force if necessary.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0110
rows.name: Point Out[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0111
rows.name:
State that if it is an internal dispute,
he should persuade them himself.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0120
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0121
rows.name:
Ask for details about
the opposing group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0130
rows.name: Suggest[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0131
rows.name:
State that he should respect the
will of the opposing group.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0015
rows.name:
This is not a task that a powerless
individual like myself could accomplish.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0016
rows.name:
Furthermore, even if I were to find them, the
leader of the anti-Ovah revolution movement—Run'otonam
and the rest— would not even listen to me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0017
rows.name:
I have debated with her countless
times, but I was never able to
correct her way of thinking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0018
rows.name:
...However, an Earthling like you
might be able to hold a conversation
even with such heretics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0019
rows.name:
Let us reconsider our way of
life ruled by the Ovah and
live freely like Earthlings—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0020
rows.name:
That is what Run'otonam, the leader of
the anti-Ovah revolution movement, said.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0021
rows.name:
Hmph, despite debating her
countless times, I could not
correct her foolish way of thinking.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0022
rows.name:
...However, an Earthling like you
might be able to hold a conversation
even with such heretics.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0023
rows.name:
It seems you would get along well
with Run'otonam, the leader of the
anti-Ovah revolution movement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0024
rows.name:
But if things continue as they are, they
will definitely die. No matter how
Earthling-like their thought patterns may be...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0025
rows.name:
In the end, it does not change the fact
that they are physically frail Orpheans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0026
rows.name:
Could you please accept the mission
to search for the group that left
the city with Run'otonam?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0027
rows.name:
The ones who disappeared alongside
Run'otonam are Mun'luarb,
Man'osarag, and Rin'luarb.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0028
rows.name:
We calculated the probability
of them surviving in the Nightglow
Forest to be 0%, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0029
rows.name:
You Earthlings have overturned
the probabilities we calculated
countless times, have you not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0030
rows.name:
I implore you to accomplish this mission
as well with your unpredictable and
mysterious power. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0031
rows.name:
Run'otonam said that "something"
we need exists deep within
the Nightglow Forest.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0032
rows.name: But that is a foolish delusion.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0033
rows.name:
My inner Ovah is clearly
warning me never to go near
that forest again, after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0034
rows.name:
...Please track them down and bring them
back to NLA. I am counting on you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0035
rows.name: What is this turbulence in the Ovah...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0036
rows.name:
What on earth happened...?
What happened to Run'otonam?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0210
rows.name: Report[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0211
rows.name:
Tell him they were eaten by a native
creature in the Nightglow Forest and died.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0220
rows.name: Message[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0221
rows.name: Convey Run'otonam's final words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0037
rows.name:
So that is the ultimate fate
of those who defy the Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0038
rows.name:
At a time when we must increase our
numbers to survive on Mira... What
on earth were they doing...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0039
rows.name:
She left a message telling us to become
capable of controlling the Ovah, and then
went and got herself eaten by a monster?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0040
rows.name:
...How foolish. We are
always one with the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0041
rows.name:
If we are to commit an act that
betrays it, then there is no
meaning to our existence here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0042
rows.name:
—Well, this will likely serve as a
wake-up call to those who supported
the anti-Ovah revolution movement.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0043
rows.name:
Because it has proven that we cannot
live without the guidance of the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0044
rows.name:
The loss of Run'otonam and the others
is severe... but we must strengthen
the unity of the Orpheans once more.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0045
rows.name:
I intend to guide the divided
entities so that something like
this never happens again.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0046
rows.name:
Hmm... This completes your mission.
Please accept your reward.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0047
rows.name: What is this turbulence in the Ovah...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0048
rows.name:
What on earth happened...?
What happened to Run'otonam?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0049
rows.name:
Is this... her right hand? I see,
she was eaten by a monster...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0051
rows.name:
...Hm... It seems I can still sense
the Ovah that flowed within her.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0053
rows.name: Wha—! What is this!![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0054
rows.name:
A primitive world... seen by the Ovah
before it even resided within us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0055
rows.name:
Are you saying we had already encountered
that terrifying beast even back then?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0310
rows.name: Question[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0311
rows.name: Ask him what exactly he saw.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_JNK0320
rows.name: Message[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_SEL0321
rows.name: Convey Run'otonam's final words.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0056
rows.name:
This is— a memory from before
us Orpheans were born.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0057
rows.name:
It is a memory from when the Ovah
drifted through the sea of another
world as a single lifeform.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0058
rows.name: I cannot sense it clearly, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0059
rows.name:
It seems the monster you defeated
existed there too, forming an
entirely different ecosystem...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0060
rows.name:
...I do not know what this
memory means either.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0061
rows.name:
However, it is certainly a truth that
Run'otonam risked her life to uncover.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0062
rows.name: We must change...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0063
rows.name:
I feel like I can understand
the meaning of her words now
that I have touched her Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0064
rows.name:
—I completely failed to comprehend the
thinking of those who rejected the Ovah.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0065
rows.name:
But—just like this incident with the monster, there
are many uncertain elements in this land that
cannot be judged by the information we possess.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0066
rows.name:
In order to preserve our species in such a place,
we will require a higher level of judgment that
goes beyond even the guidance of the Ovah...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0067
rows.name:
...What Run'otonam wanted to convey, I
have received it along with her life.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0068
rows.name:
From now on, I intend to
search for a new path and
move forward, just as she did.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0069
rows.name:
Thank you so much... for bringing
this right arm, which holds Run'otonam's
will, all the way back here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev056101_MSG0070
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I was able to reform my way of thinking.
From now on, I will be able to debate flexibly with the
supporters of the anti-Ovah revolution movement.[ST:wait ]
